title: Medusa: Cross-Modal Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Multimodal Medical Retrieval-Augmented Generation

support.program: Zhejiang Leading Innovative and Entrepreneur Team Introduction Program

publication.conference: 31st ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining

abstract: This paper presents a method for extracting structured metadata from a research paper. It focuses on cross-modal transferable adversarial attacks on multimodal medical retrieval-augmented generation (MMed-RAG) systems. The method remains robust against four mainstream defenses and outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Results reveal vulnerabilities in MMed-RAG systems and highlight the need for robustness benchmarking in safety-critical medical applications.
